title: cynorkis globosa
intro: Cynorkis globosa, also known as the globosa orchid, is a species of orchid found in tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as skin conditions such as wounds and abscesses. Cynorkis globosa can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its health benefits.
